creator: michael@meiszl.de
text:
#metoo :-)

updated to 13.2 (as usual like I do since 4.0) and 
I now get the warning that userland and kernel are not in sync

[root@l3router ~]# freebsd-version -u -k -r
13.2-RELEASE
13.2-RELEASE
13.1-RELEASE-p7

freebsd-update tells me that there are no updates available, the osrelease_enable is "YES" (as it should be) but it seems that some binaries have not been exchanged by the update.

what to do?
(beside this, the system behaves normal, no errors elsewhere)
